properties.name: park_terraces_passive
properties.use: open park terraces — sitting, lunch, reading; no programme

properties.name: ceremony_seating
properties.use: front two rows of all three sections + orchestra folding chairs
properties.temporary_structures: folding chairs on the orchestra floor

properties.name: temporary_screen_line
properties.use: inflatable screen across the stage, rigged after sunset, struck the same night
properties.note: night-only: never a permanent view obstruction in the bay corridor

properties.name: concert_stage_and_pa
properties.use: amplified performance; PA on stage wings
properties.temporary_structures: line arrays on stage corners, FOH mix on the cross-aisle (bend section)
properties.note: sound aimed up-fan (SE) away from the bay; curfew per ordinance

properties.name: spillover_shoulders_and_lawn
properties.use: overflow blanket ground on the row-end shoulders (landscape, no grading)

properties.name: vendor_line_rim
properties.use: vendor stalls along the rim arrival edge

properties.name: winter_passive_bowl
properties.use: passive winter landscape — terraces hold snow lines; furnishings removed
properties.note: stage deck cleared and snow-shed; treatment cell dormant meadow
